specs.materials: 1" 45lb HD industrial-grade particle board, high-pressure scratch-resistant laminate, 3mm vinyl bonded edgeband, 16 ga 1.25" steel tube frame
finishes_available: Standard laminates: Fusion Maple, Medium Oak, Wild Cherry, Tundra Sky/Ice, Catalina, Dragon Fire, Candy Apple
Professional: Designer White, Mission Maple, Studio Teak, wood-tone alternatives
key_features: Swivel floor glides or optional 2/4 locking swivel castors
Fully welded leg construction with laser-cut support bracket
specs.notes: Aktivity Environ is the larger work-table format in MityBilt's Aktivity classroom line; shares construction with Puddle and other Aktivity SKUs
specs.who_its_for: Elementary school classrooms, early childhood education centres, and daycare facilities that need height-adjustable, GREENGUARD Gold-certified activity surfaces with rounded corners and institutional-grade durability.
